name: Deep Dish Fresh Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare pastry for an 8-inch single crust pie. Set aside.
2. Sprinkle lemon juice over peach slices in a large bowl. Mix 1 1/4 cups sugar with the salt, nutmeg, cinnamon and flour. Add to peaches. Toss until evenly coated.
3. Spread in a 1 1/2 quart baking dish. Dot with butter.
4. Roll out pastry to cover dish with 1 1/2 inch overhang. Press pastry to edge of dish and flute the edge.
5. Cut 3 vents in top. Sprinkle with remaining sugar.
6. Bake at 450 degrees for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for 30 more minutes.
7. Serve with whipped cream.
